annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.04 adopted as an emergency provision effective February 1, 1986 (13:3 Md. R. 269); adopted permanently effective February 24, 1986 (13:4 Md. R. 397)
Regulation .01 amended effective July 22, 1991 (18:14 Md. R. 1610); November 6, 2006 (Md. R. 1733)
Regulation .02 amended effective November 6, 2006 (33:22 Md. R. 1733)
Regulation .04A and C amended effective July 22, 1991 (18:14 Md. R. 1610)
Regulation .04 repealed effective November 6, 2006 (33:22 Md. R. 1733)
Regulations .01—.03 repealed effective February 17, 2014 (41:3 Md. R. 202)
